creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear maintainer of FreeBSD port mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin, please take a
look at 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=113811

Can you comment on this PR?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Quantum physics was developed in the 1930's, as a result of a bet
between Albert Einstein and Niels Bohr, to see who could come up with
the most ridiculous theory and still have it published.
